---
title: "Demo Session: Page Design Showcase"
id: "mod001-se01"
toc: True
---

This session demonstrates all pedagogical page designs available in the system.

### Learning Objectives
<br>

- Identify different pedagogical page types


- Understand how each page structure supports learning


- Review how page types are defined in YAML



<br>

<br>

<!-- START_NAVIGATION -->


```{=html}
<div class="custom-page-navigation">
    <div class="nav-prev">
        
        <a href="../index.qmd">
            <span class="nav-label">← Previous</span>
            <span class="nav-title">Demo Module: Pedagogical Page Designs</span>
        </a>
        
    </div>
    <div class="nav-next">
        
        <a href="01-core-learning-pages/index.qmd">
            <span class="nav-label">Next →</span>
            <span class="nav-title">Core Learning Pages</span>
        </a>
        
    </div>
</div>
```

<!-- END_NAVIGATION -->
